name: Guest Demo Project
description: Default project for guest users to explore Fusion Project Manager features

defaultAssignments.title: Assignment 1: HTML Basics
defaultAssignments.subtitle: Introduction to HTML structure
defaultAssignments.description: Learn the fundamentals of HTML including tags, elements, and document structure. Create your first webpage with proper semantic markup.

defaultAssignments.title: Assignment 2: CSS Styling
defaultAssignments.subtitle: Style your webpages with CSS
defaultAssignments.description: Master CSS selectors, properties, and values. Apply colors, fonts, layouts, and responsive design principles to create beautiful web interfaces.

defaultAssignments.title: Assignment 3: JavaScript Fundamentals
defaultAssignments.subtitle: Add interactivity with JavaScript
defaultAssignments.description: Explore JavaScript basics including variables, functions, conditionals, and loops. Make your webpages interactive and dynamic.

defaultAssignments.title: Assignment 4: DOM Manipulation
defaultAssignments.subtitle: Control webpage elements
defaultAssignments.description: Learn to select and manipulate HTML elements using JavaScript. Handle events, modify content, and create dynamic user experiences.

defaultAssignments.title: Assignment 5: Forms & Validation
defaultAssignments.subtitle: Create interactive forms
defaultAssignments.description: Build HTML forms with proper validation. Handle user input, validate data, and provide meaningful feedback to users.

defaultAssignments.title: Assignment 6: API Integration
defaultAssignments.subtitle: Connect to external APIs
defaultAssignments.description: Fetch data from web APIs using JavaScript. Parse JSON responses and display dynamic content from external sources.

defaultAssignments.title: Assignment 7: Local Storage
defaultAssignments.subtitle: Store data in the browser
defaultAssignments.description: Use localStorage and sessionStorage to persist data in the browser. Build applications that remember user preferences and state.

defaultAssignments.title: Assignment 8: Responsive Design
defaultAssignments.subtitle: Mobile-first development
defaultAssignments.description: Create responsive layouts that adapt to different screen sizes. Use media queries, flexbox, and grid for modern web design.

defaultAssignments.title: Assignment 9: Accessibility
defaultAssignments.subtitle: Build inclusive websites
defaultAssignments.description: Implement accessibility best practices. Use ARIA attributes, semantic HTML, and keyboard navigation for all users.

defaultAssignments.title: Assignment 10: Final Project
defaultAssignments.subtitle: Showcase your skills
defaultAssignments.description: Combine all learned concepts to build a complete web application. Demonstrate your mastery of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

defaultProjectPhases.title: Phase 1: Planning & Requirements
defaultProjectPhases.subtitle: Define project scope and goals
defaultProjectPhases.description: Gather requirements, define project scope, identify stakeholders, and create a comprehensive project plan with timelines and deliverables.

defaultProjectPhases.title: Phase 2: Design & Architecture
defaultProjectPhases.subtitle: Create system designs
defaultProjectPhases.description: Design the system architecture, create wireframes and mockups, define database schemas, and plan the technical implementation.

defaultProjectPhases.title: Phase 3: Development Sprint 1
defaultProjectPhases.subtitle: Build core features
defaultProjectPhases.description: Develop the foundational features and core functionality. Set up the development environment and implement base components.

defaultProjectPhases.title: Phase 4: Development Sprint 2
defaultProjectPhases.subtitle: Advanced features
defaultProjectPhases.description: Implement advanced features, integrate third-party services, and build out the complete feature set for the application.

defaultProjectPhases.title: Phase 5: Testing & QA
defaultProjectPhases.subtitle: Quality assurance
defaultProjectPhases.description: Conduct thorough testing including unit tests, integration tests, and user acceptance testing. Fix bugs and optimize performance.

defaultProjectPhases.title: Phase 6: Deployment
defaultProjectPhases.subtitle: Launch to production
defaultProjectPhases.description: Deploy the application to production servers, configure hosting, set up monitoring, and ensure everything runs smoothly in the live environment.

defaultProjectPhases.title: Phase 7: Documentation
defaultProjectPhases.subtitle: Create comprehensive docs
defaultProjectPhases.description: Write user documentation, API documentation, and technical guides. Create tutorials and help resources for end users.

defaultProjectPhases.title: Phase 8: User Training
defaultProjectPhases.subtitle: Onboard users
defaultProjectPhases.description: Conduct training sessions, create training materials, and ensure users understand how to effectively use the application.

defaultProjectPhases.title: Phase 9: Monitoring & Support
defaultProjectPhases.subtitle: Ongoing maintenance
defaultProjectPhases.description: Monitor application performance, provide user support, address issues, and maintain system stability post-launch.

defaultProjectPhases.title: Phase 10: Iteration & Enhancement
defaultProjectPhases.subtitle: Continuous improvement
defaultProjectPhases.description: Gather user feedback, plan enhancements, implement new features, and continuously improve the application based on real-world usage.
